chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1043 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 21-03-2024 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Irfan, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro,J:- Learned counsel for SEPCO / respondent No.5 has filed a statement revealing that an amount of Rs.44531/- has already been deducted from the monthly bill of the petitioner and remaining amount of Rs.45000/- will be deducted in the coming month. Thereafter correct bill would be issued to the petitioner. However, learned counsel for the petitioner disputes the calculation made by the SEPCO. In any case, learned counsel for the SEPCO undertakes that after a proper calculation and keeping in view the order of Electric Inspector dated 27.05.2019 correction would be made and if any further amount is found to have been issued to the petitioner in excess of his original bill, the same would be deducted and correct bill would be issued to him. Accordingly this petition is disposed of in the above terms. Compliance report shall be filed after two months. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA 2
